title: calamagrostis chrysophylla
intro: Calamagrostis chrysophylla, also known as golden feather grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Calamagrostis chrysophylla include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and promoting digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Calamagrostis chrysophylla can be prepared in various forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
